channel.title: Hobbies on zmeyche.com
channel.description: Recent content in Hobbies on zmeyche.com

item.title: Lego Moc Art 01
item.description:
A friend reminded me that I should share more of the shit I create.

So here I am, sharing the shit I create.

You can find below the instructions for the mini LEGO recreations of:

  • LEGO MOC Hokusai - The Wave off Kanagawa
  • LEGO MOC Mondrian - Composition with Red Blue and Yellow
  • LEGO MOC Munch - The sun
  • LEGO MOC Rothko - Orange and yellow
  • LEGO MOC Van Gogh - Sunflowers (or as another friend put it - “Budget Van Gogh”)

and two originals:
